summary: Phase 27.2-27.5: اختبار endpoints السائق والمتجر بعد إعادة الهيكلة. تم استبدال 5 استعلامات MongoDB مكررة بدوال helper. جميع 23 اختبار نجحت. لا يوجد regression.

details: verify_delivery_code uses get_order_for_driver with statuses parameter
report_food_delivery_failed uses get_order_for_driver with statuses parameter
report_false_driver_arrival uses get_user_store and get_order_for_store helpers
get_order_for_driver uses $in operator for multiple statuses
food_orders.py is now 4274 lines (was 4300 before Phase 27)
Only 0 direct driver order queries (most replaced with helper)

phase27_changes.change_description: استبدال 5 استعلامات MongoDB مكررة بدوال helper
phase27_changes.benefit: تقليل التكرار واستخدام دوال helper موجودة مع دعم معامل statuses

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 27.2-27.5 refactoring is clean and minimal
Duplicate MongoDB queries successfully replaced with helper functions
get_order_for_driver now supports statuses parameter for flexible status filtering
No functional changes - only code deduplication
All API endpoints continue to work correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 27.2-27.5 completed successfully. food_orders.py is now 4274 lines (was 4300 in Phase 26, -26 lines). Driver endpoints (arrived, verify-code, failed) and store endpoint (report-false-arrival) now use helper functions. get_order_for_driver supports statuses parameter for flexible status filtering. All 23 tests pass. No regression detected.
